parameters.query:
WITH last_inbound AS (
  SELECT
    wc.id AS conversation_id,
    wc.contact_id,
    wc.bot_active,
    wc.status AS conv_status,
    wc.last_message,
    wc.last_message_at,
    co.wa_id,
    c.id AS crm_contact_id,
    c.nome,
    c.telefone,
    c.stage,
    c.observacoes_sdr,
    c.followup_count,
    c.last_bot_msg_at,
    c.last_lead_msg_at,
    -- ultima mensagem inbound do lead
    (
      SELECT MAX(wm.created_at)
      FROM wa_messages wm
      WHERE wm.conversation_id = wc.id
        AND wm.direction = 'inbound'
    ) AS last_inbound_at,
    -- ultima mensagem outbound do bot
    (
      SELECT MAX(wm.created_at)
      FROM wa_messages wm
      WHERE wm.conversation_id = wc.id
        AND wm.direction = 'outbound'
    ) AS last_outbound_at
  FROM wa_conversations wc
  JOIN wa_contacts co ON co.id = wc.contact_id
  JOIN contacts c ON c.telefone = co.wa_id
  WHERE wc.bot_active = true
    AND wc.status = 'open'
    AND c.stage NOT IN ('agendado', 'agendou', 'fechou', 'perdido')
    AND c.followup_count < 3
)
SELECT *
FROM last_inbound
WHERE (
  -- Caso 1: Bot mandou ultima msg e lead nao respondeu em 24-48h
  (last_outbound_at > COALESCE(last_inbound_at, '1970-01-01'::timestamp)
   AND last_outbound_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
   AND last_outbound_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '72 hours')
  OR
  -- Caso 2: Lead mandou msg mas bot nao respondeu (edge case)
  (last_inbound_at IS NOT NULL
   AND last_inbound_at > COALESCE(last_outbound_at, '1970-01-01'::timestamp)
   AND last_inbound_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
   AND last_inbound_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '72 hours')
  OR
  -- Caso 3: Conversa nova sem resposta do lead apos primeira msg do bot
  (last_inbound_at IS NULL
   AND last_outbound_at IS NOT NULL
   AND last_outbound_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
   AND last_outbound_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '72 hours')
)
ORDER BY last_outbound_at ASC
LIMIT 50;

nodes.name: Buscar Leads Elegiveis
nodes.notes: Busca leads que nao responderam em 24-72h, com bot ativo, nao em estagio final, e com menos de 3 followups

nodes.name: Enviar Reengagement
nodes.notes: Envia a mensagem de reengagement via bot-send endpoint (que salva no banco e envia via Meta API)

parameters.query:
UPDATE contacts
SET
  followup_count = followup_count + 1,
  last_bot_msg_at = NOW(),
  updated_at = NOW(),
  observacoes_sdr = COALESCE(observacoes_sdr, '') || E'\nFollowup #' || (followup_count + 1) || ' enviado em ' || TO_CHAR(NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo', 'DD/MM/YYYY HH24:MI') || '.'
WHERE id = {{ $json.crm_contact_id }};

nodes.name: Marcar Followup Enviado
nodes.notes: Incrementa followup_count e registra nas observacoes_sdr para nao reenviar e manter historico

nodes.name: Esperar 3s
nodes.notes: Throttle para nao sobrecarregar a API (3s entre cada envio). Conectar output do Marcar Followup aqui se precisar loop.
